name: l2_rotor_disk_aperture
value: Aerodynamics4McL2RotorDiskAperture builds rotor-disk plane axes equal-area aperture samples and static-mask open area summaries for future actuator disk fitting.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 rotor disk aperture packet.

name: l2_drone_probe
value: Aerodynamics4McL2DroneProbe supplies the bounded static-airframe solid mask used to evaluate whether rotor disk aperture samples remain open.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 rotor disk aperture packet.

name: drone_config_rotors
value: DroneConfig and RotorSpec provide rotor center thrust-axis radius chord and preset layout data for the aperture sample plan.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 rotor disk aperture packet.

name: l2_bridge_request
value: Aerodynamics4McL2Bridge provides the sanitized inlet vector and force-moment request envelope associated with each aperture summary.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 rotor disk aperture packet.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future powered rotor or porous actuator disk L2 force moment calibration.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 rotor disk aperture packet.

name: equal_area_rotor_disk_mask_probe
value: Sample four equal-area radial rings and sixteen azimuths per rotor in the true rotor thrust-axis plane then estimate open actuator disk area against the static L2 airframe mask.
note: Geometry packet is a guardrail before adding powered-rotor or porous-disk A4MC calibration.
